sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ALEXANDRINE de Vienne (-after 1242).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE於大約1170年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔時，她的父親Géraud Ier de Mâcon47歲，母親Maurette de Salins40歲。她於大約1188年與Ulrich II de BAUGE在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1242年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE于大约1170年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔时，她的父亲Géraud Ier de Mâcon47岁，母亲Maurette de Salins40岁。她于大约1188年与Ulrich II de BAUGE在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1242年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alexandrine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: derivative of   Alexandra .  It was most common in the 19th century, and was in fact the first name of  Queen Victoria .

en.lifeSummary: When Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE was born about 1170, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, was 47 and her mother, Maurette de Salins, was 40. She married Ulrich II de BAUGE about 1188, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1242, in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE est née environ 1170, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Maurette de Salins, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Ulrich II de BAUGE environ 1188, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1242, à Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE um 1170 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Géraud Ier de Mâcon 47 und ihre Mutter Maurette de Salins 40. Sie hat um 1188 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Ulrich II de BAUGE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1242 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE è nata il circa 1170 nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Maurette de Salins, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Ulrich II de BAUGE circa 1188, nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1242, nel Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTEが約1170年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンで生まれた時，父Géraud Ier de Mâconは47歳，母Maurette de Salinsは40歳であった。約1188年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンでUlrich II de BAUGEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1242年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスエインブaグe-レ-チaテルで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE(이)가 대략 1170년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Géraud Ier de Mâcon(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maurette de Salins(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1188년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 Ulrich II de BAUGE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 언 브a그e-레-cha텔에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Maurette de Salins, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Ulrich II de BAUGE aproximadamente 1188, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1242, em Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE родилась около 1170 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Géraud Ier de Mâcon было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Maurette de Salins, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ulrich II de BAUGE около 1188 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1242 г. в местности бaгe-ле-чaтел, эин, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE nació aproximadamente 1170, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Maurette de Salins, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Ulrich II de BAUGE aproximadamente 1188, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1242, en Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 74 años.
